Package cc.quaternion.potshaper

Class PotShape

java.lang.Object
cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotElement
cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotShape
All Implemented Interfaces:
IPotElement
public class PotShape extends PotElement
Represents a shape element within a PowerPoint slide.

This class provides a fluent API for creating and configuring shapes such as rectangles, circles, and arrows. It encapsulates an Apache POI XSLFAutoShape and offers methods to set its geometry, fill, border, text content, font properties, and various visual effects. All methods that modify the shape return this to enable method chaining.

Basic Shape Creation


 PotShape shape = slide.addShape(PotShapeType.RECTANGLE)
     .at(100, 100)
     .size(200, 100)
     .fill(PotColor.BLUE)
     .border(PotBorder.of(PotColor.DARK_BLUE, 2));

Text Shape Creation


 slide.addShape(PotShapeType.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE)
     .at(100, 100)
     .size(200, 100)
     .fill(PotColor.LIGHT_BLUE)
     .setText("Hello")
     .fontColor(PotColor.WHITE)
     .align(PotAlignment.CENTER)
     .verticalAlign(PotVerticalAlignment.MIDDLE);
Since:
1.0
Author:
Quaternion8192

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    PotShape
    action(PotAction action)
    Attaches an action (e.g., mouseclick or mouseover) to the element.

    Sets a raw adjustment value for this shape's geometry.

    Sets the horizontal text alignment for all paragraphs within this shape.

  • Method Details

    • getShapeType

      public PotShapeType getShapeType()
      Returns the geometric type of this shape.
      Returns:
      the shape type, such as RECTANGLE or ELLIPSE

    • setShapeType

      public PotShape setShapeType(PotShapeType shapeType)
      Changes the geometric type of this shape.

      This method modifies the underlying shape's geometry while preserving its position, size, and other visual properties.

      Parameters:
      shapeType - the new shape type to apply
      Returns:
      this shape for method chaining
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if shapeType is null

    • fill

      public PotShape fill(PotColor color)
      Sets a solid color fill for this shape.

      If the provided color is null, the fill is cleared, making the shape transparent.

      Parameters:
      color - the color to fill the shape with
      Returns:
      this shape for method chaining

    • fill

      public PotShape fill(Color color)
      Sets a solid color fill for this shape using a standard AWT Color.
      Parameters:
      color - the AWT color to fill the shape with
      Returns:
      this shape for method chaining

    • fill

      public PotShape fill(PotFill fill)
      Applies a complex fill to this shape.

      The fill can be a solid color, gradient, image, or pattern, as defined by the PotFill object. If the fill is null, the shape's fill is cleared.

      Parameters:
      fill - the fill definition to apply
      Returns:
      this shape for method chaining

    • fill

      public PotShape fill(PotGradient gradient)
      Applies a gradient fill to this shape.

      If the gradient is null, this method has no effect.

      Parameters:
      gradient - the gradient definition to apply
      Returns:
      this shape for method chaining

    • noFill

      public PotShape noFill()
      Removes any fill from this shape, making it transparent.
      Returns:
      this shape for method chaining

    • getFillColor

      public PotColor getFillColor()
      Returns the current solid fill color of this shape.

      If the shape has no fill, a gradient fill, an image fill, or a pattern fill, this method returns null.

      Returns:
      the current fill color, or null if not applicable

    • border

      public PotShape border(PotBorder border)
      Applies a border to this shape.

      The border definition includes color, width, dash style, and cap style. If the border is null, the shape's border is removed.

      Parameters:
      border - the border definition to apply
      Returns:
      this shape for method chaining

    • borderColor

      public PotShape borderColor(PotColor color)
      Sets the border color of this shape.

      If the color is null, the border color is not changed.

      Parameters:
      color - the color for the shape's border
      Returns:
      this shape for method chaining

    • borderColor

      public PotShape borderColor(Color color)
      Sets the border color of this shape using a standard AWT Color.
      Parameters:
      color - the AWT color for the shape's border
      Returns:
      this shape for method chaining

    • borderWidth

      public PotShape borderWidth(double width)
      Sets the border width of this shape.

      The width must be a non-negative value. A width of zero effectively removes the border.

      Parameters:
      width - the border width in points
      Returns:
      this shape for method chaining
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if width is negative

    • noBorder

      public PotShape noBorder()
      Removes the border from this shape by setting its width to zero.
      Returns:
      this shape for method chaining

    • getLineColor

      public PotColor getLineColor()
      Returns the current border color of this shape.

      If the shape has no border, this method returns null.

      Returns:
      the current border color, or null if no border is set

    • getLineWidth

      public double getLineWidth()
      Returns the current border width of this shape.
      Returns:
      the border width in points

    • setText

      public PotShape setText(String text)
      Sets the text content of this shape.

      If the text is null, an empty string is used. This method replaces any existing text in the shape.

      Parameters:
      text - the text to display within the shape
      Returns:
      this shape for method chaining

    • getText

      public String getText()
      Returns the text content of this shape.
      Returns:
      the shape's text, which may be an empty string

    • appendText

      public PotShape appendText(String text, boolean newLine)
      Appends text to the existing content of this shape.

      If the text is null, this method has no effect.

      Parameters:
      text - the text to append
      newLine - if true, the appended text starts on a new line
      Returns:
      this shape for method chaining

    • clearText

      public PotShape clearText()
      Clears all text content from this shape.
      Returns:
      this shape for method chaining

    • fontFamily

      public PotShape fontFamily(String family)
      Sets the font family for all text runs within this shape.
      Parameters:
      family - the font family name (e.g., "Arial")
      Returns:
      this shape for method chaining
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if family is null or blank

    • fontSize

      public PotShape fontSize(double size)
      Sets the font size for all text runs within this shape.
      Parameters:
      size - the font size in points
      Returns:
      this shape for method chaining
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if size is not positive

    • fontColor

      public PotShape fontColor(PotColor color)
      Sets the font color for all text runs within this shape.

      If the color is null, the font color is not changed.

      Parameters:
      color - the color for the text
      Returns:
      this shape for method chaining

    • bold

      public PotShape bold()
      Applies bold styling to all text runs within this shape.

      This is a convenience method equivalent to bold(true).

      Returns:
      this shape for method chaining

    • bold

      public PotShape bold(boolean bold)
      Enables or disables bold styling for all text runs within this shape.
      Parameters:
      bold - true to make the text bold, false to remove bold styling
      Returns:
      this shape for method chaining

    • italic

      public PotShape italic()
      Applies italic styling to all text runs within this shape.

      This is a convenience method equivalent to italic(true).

      Returns:
      this shape for method chaining

    • italic

      public PotShape italic(boolean italic)
      Enables or disables italic styling for all text runs within this shape.
      Parameters:
      italic - true to make the text italic, false to remove italic styling
      Returns:
      this shape for method chaining

    • underline

      public PotShape underline(boolean underline)
      Enables or disables underline styling for all text runs within this shape.
      Parameters:
      underline - true to underline the text, false to remove underlining
      Returns:
      this shape for method chaining

    • font

      public PotShape font(PotFont font)
      Applies multiple font properties from a PotFont object to all text runs.

      Only the non-null properties of the font object are applied. If the font is null, this method has no effect.

      Parameters:
      font - the font definition containing family, size, color, and style properties
      Returns:
      this shape for method chaining

    • align

      public PotShape align(PotAlignment alignment)
      Sets the horizontal text alignment for all paragraphs within this shape.

      If the alignment is null, the alignment is not changed.

      Parameters:
      alignment - the desired horizontal alignment
      Returns:
      this shape for method chaining

    • verticalAlign

      public PotShape verticalAlign(PotVerticalAlignment alignment)
      Sets the vertical text alignment for this shape.
      Parameters:
      alignment - the desired vertical alignment
      Returns:
      this shape for method chaining
      See Also:
      • align(PotAlignment)

    • textPadding

      public PotShape textPadding(double padding)
      Sets uniform padding around the text content within this shape.

      The padding is specified in points and applies equally to all four sides.

      Parameters:
      padding - the padding value in points for all sides
      Returns:
      this shape for method chaining
      See Also:
      • textPadding(double, double, double, double)

    • textPadding

      public PotShape textPadding(double top, double right, double bottom, double left)
      Sets individual padding values for each side around the text content within this shape.

      Padding values are specified in points.

      Parameters:
      top - the top padding in points
      right - the right padding in points
      bottom - the bottom padding in points
      left - the left padding in points
      Returns:
      this shape for method chaining
      See Also:
      • textPadding(double)

    • cornerRadius

      public PotShape cornerRadius(double radius)
      Sets the corner radius for rounded rectangle shapes.

      This method is primarily intended for shapes of type PotShapeType.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE. The radius is expressed as a percentage of the shape's half-dimension, typically ranging from 0 to 100. Internally, the value is converted to the underlying XML adjustment value.

      Parameters:
      radius - the corner radius percentage (typically 0-100)
      Returns:
      this shape for method chaining
      See Also:
      • adjust(String, int)

    • adjust

      public PotShape adjust(String name, int value)
      Sets a raw adjustment value for this shape's geometry.

      This is a low-level method for directly manipulating the shape's geometry adjustment handles (e.g., "adj", "adj1", "adj2"). The meaning of the value depends on the shape type and adjustment name.

      Parameters:
      name - the adjustment handle name (e.g., "adj", "adj1", "adj2")
      value - the adjustment value (typically in the range 0-100000)
      Returns:
      this shape for method chaining
      See Also:
      • cornerRadius(double)

    • duplicate

      public PotShape duplicate()
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Creates a copy of this element on the same slide.

      Supported element types

      • PotShape geometric shapes
      • PotTextBox text boxes
      • PotImage images
      • PotTable tables
      • PotConnector connector lines

      Other element types such as PotAudio or PotVideo are not supported and will throw a PotException.

      Usage Example

      
 PotTextBox original = slide.addTextBox("Original");
 PotTextBox copy = original.duplicate();
 copy.setText("Copy").move(100, 0);
      Specified by:
      duplicate in interface IPotElement
      Overrides:
      duplicate in class PotElement
      Returns:
      a new element that is a duplicate of this one

    • getParagraphCount

      public int getParagraphCount()
      Returns the number of text paragraphs inside this shape.

      This method counts the paragraphs defined in the underlying Apache POI shape. A paragraph is a block of text that can have its own alignment and formatting. An empty shape or one with no explicit text may still contain a default empty paragraph.

      Returns:
      the number of text paragraphs, which is always at least zero.

    • getParagraphs

      public List<org.apache.poi.xslf.usermodel.XSLFTextParagraph> getParagraphs()
      Returns the list of raw Apache POI text paragraphs for this shape.

      This provides direct access to the underlying POI paragraph objects for advanced manipulation not covered by the PotShape API. Modifications to these objects directly affect the shape's content and formatting.

      Usage Example

      
 PotShape shape = slide.addShape(PotShapeType.RECTANGLE).setText("Line 1\nLine 2");
 List<XSLFTextParagraph> paragraphs = shape.getParagraphs();
 for (XSLFTextParagraph p : paragraphs) {
     p.setTextAlign(TextParagraph.TextAlign.CENTER);
 }
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable list of XSLFTextParagraph objects.
      See Also:
      • XSLFTextParagraph

    • getRawAutoShape

      public org.apache.poi.xslf.usermodel.XSLFAutoShape getRawAutoShape()
      Returns the underlying Apache POI XSLFAutoShape object.

      This method provides access to the raw POI object for operations that are not yet supported by the PotShape wrapper. Use with caution, as direct modifications may conflict with the wrapper's state.

      Returns:
      the raw XSLFAutoShape instance managed by this PotShape.

      Parameters:

    • scale

      public PotShape scale(double scale)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Scales the element uniformly by the specified factor.
      Overrides:
      scale in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      scale - the scaling factor; 1.0 represents 100%, must be positive
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • scale

      public PotShape scale(double scaleX, double scaleY)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Scales the element independently along the X and Y axes.
      Overrides:

      Parameters:
      scaleX - the horizontal scaling factor; must be positive
      scaleY - the vertical scaling factor; must be positive
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • rotate

      public PotShape rotate(double angle)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Sets the rotation angle of the element.

      Rotation is only applied to simple shapes; other shape types are unaffected.

      Overrides:
      rotate in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      angle - the rotation angle in degrees
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • rotation

      public PotShape rotation(double angle)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Sets the rotation angle of the element (fluent builder alias).
      Overrides:
      rotation in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      angle - the rotation angle in degrees
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • rotateBy

      public PotShape rotateBy(double deltaAngle)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Rotates the element by the specified angle delta.

      Rotation is only applied to simple shapes; other shape types are unaffected.

      Overrides:
      rotateBy in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      deltaAngle - the angle to add to the current rotation, in degrees
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • flipHorizontal

      public PotShape flipHorizontal()
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Toggles the horizontal flip state of the element.

      Flipping is only applied to simple shapes; other shape types are unaffected.

      Overrides:
      flipHorizontal in class PotElement
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • flipVertical

      public PotShape flipVertical()
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Toggles the vertical flip state of the element.

      Flipping is only applied to simple shapes; other shape types are unaffected.

      Overrides:
      flipVertical in class PotElement
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • bringToFront

      public PotShape bringToFront()
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Brings this element to the front of the slide's drawing order.

      This operation manipulates the underlying XML structure of the slide.

      Overrides:
      bringToFront in class PotElement
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • sendToBack

      public PotShape sendToBack()
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Sends this element to the back of the slide's drawing order.

      This method uses internal XML manipulation because Apache POI does not provide a direct API for zorder changes.

      Overrides:
      sendToBack in class PotElement
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • bringForward

      public PotShape bringForward()
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Brings this element one step forward in the slide's drawing order.

      This method uses internal XML manipulation because Apache POI does not provide a direct API for zorder changes.

      Overrides:
      bringForward in class PotElement
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • sendBackward

      public PotShape sendBackward()
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Sends this element one step backward in the slide's drawing order.

      This method uses internal XML manipulation because Apache POI does not provide a direct API for zorder changes.

      Overrides:
      sendBackward in class PotElement
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • animate

      public PotShape animate(PotAnimation animation)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Applies an animation to this element.
      Overrides:
      animate in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      animation - the animation to apply; must not be null
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • removeAnimation

      public PotShape removeAnimation()
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Removes any animation attached to this element.
      Overrides:
      removeAnimation in class PotElement
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • hyperlink

      public PotShape hyperlink(String url)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Attaches a hyperlink to this element that points to an external URL.

      Hyperlinks are only applicable to simple shapes; other shape types are unaffected.

      Overrides:
      hyperlink in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      url - the destination URL; must not be null
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • hyperlink

      public PotShape hyperlink(PotHyperlink link)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Attaches a hyperlink defined by a PotHyperlink object.

      If the provided link is null, any existing hyperlink is removed. Hyperlinks are only applicable to simple shapes; other shape types are unaffected.

      Overrides:
      hyperlink in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      link - the hyperlink configuration, or null to remove the hyperlink
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • hyperlinkToSlide

      public PotShape hyperlinkToSlide(int slideIndex)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Creates a hyperlink that jumps to a specific slide within the same presentation.

      This method sets both the internal slide reference and a fallback address string. Hyperlinks are only applicable to simple shapes; other shape types are unaffected.

      Overrides:
      hyperlinkToSlide in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      slideIndex - the zerobased index of the target slide
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • removeHyperlink

      public PotShape removeHyperlink()
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Removes any hyperlink attached to this element.

      This method manipulates the underlying XML because Apache POI does not provide a direct removal API. Hyperlinks are only applicable to simple shapes; other shape types are unaffected.

      Overrides:
      removeHyperlink in class PotElement
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • action

      public PotShape action(PotAction action)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Attaches an action (e.g., mouseclick or mouseover) to the element.
      Overrides:
      action in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      action - the action configuration
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • removeAction

      public PotShape removeAction(boolean isHover)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Removes an action from the element.
      Overrides:
      removeAction in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      isHover - true to remove a mouseover action, false to remove a mouseclick action
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • shadow

      public PotShape shadow(PotShadow shadow)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Applies a shadow effect to the element.

      Shadows are only applicable to simple shapes; other shape types are unaffected. Passing null or a shadow of type PotShadow.Type.NONE removes any existing shadow.

      Overrides:
      shadow in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      shadow - the shadow configuration, or null to remove the shadow
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • removeShadow

      public PotShape removeShadow()
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Removes any shadow effect from the element.
      Overrides:
      removeShadow in class PotElement
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Applies a reflection effect to the element.
      Overrides:
      reflection in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      reflection - the reflection configuration
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

      Overrides:

      Parameters:

      Returns:

      Applies a softedge effect to the element.

      Parameters:
      softEdge - the softedge configuration
      Returns:

    • removeEffects

      public PotShape removeEffects()
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Removes all visual effects (shadow, reflection, glow, softedge, 3D) from the element.
      Overrides:
      removeEffects in class PotElement
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

      Overrides:

      Parameters:

      Returns:

      Parameters:

    • lighting

      public PotShape lighting(Pot3DFormat.Lighting lighting)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Applies a lighting effect to the element.
      Overrides:
      lighting in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      lighting - the lighting configuration
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • opacity

      public PotShape opacity(double opacity)
      Description copied from class: PotElement
      Sets the opacity (transparency) of the element.

      Opacity is applied by manipulating the underlying XML, as Apache POI does not provide a direct API. The value must be between 0.0 (fully transparent) and 1.0 (fully opaque).

      Overrides:
      opacity in class PotElement
      Parameters:
      opacity - the opacity value between 0.0 (transparent) and 1.0 (opaque)
      Returns:
      this element for method chaining

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class PotElement
